title: 3DThrowables
description: 3DThrowables changes the model of the ender pearl ender eye snowball and egg to look 3D
body: This Texture pack currently changes the Ender Pearl, Ender Eye, snowball and egg also in the splash text I noticed it said something like "X+Y+Z= 21!" and I corrected it to "X+Y+Z= 21" because 21!=5.1090942e+19.
